author: potuz
content:
These are the orders of things I would test on the devnet 0:

1. Add deposit requests (top ups)
2. Deposit new validators (0x00)
3. Add actual transactions. 
4. Add blob transactions. 
5. Add withdrawal requests. 
6. Deposit new 0x01 validators or simply send BLS_TO_EXEC changes for those in step 2. 

At this point I expect us to be broken, but if we are not: 

7. Add explicit withdrawal requests (we should have a sweep by then)
8. Deposit external builders. 
9. Include external bids on blocks (no P2P yet)
